fields.name: VAT Report Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to create a new VAT report, or if you want to change a previously submitted report.

fields.name: VAT Report No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the VAT Report.

fields.name: Submitted By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person who submitted the VAT Report.

fields.name: Submittion Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the VAT Report was submitted.

fields.name: Response Received Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the response was received.
